💬 Yap Section: 

This was such a sweet request, honestly. I watched Smile 2 recently and was in desperate need of something not dark, depressing, and spooky. I had been meaning to work on a request and this one instantly came to mind. I do read all of my requests but I feel pretty bad because I somehow read some really good ones and instantly forgot about them /ᐠ ╥ ˕ ╥マ. It's probably because I check my report form early in the morning when I'm frazzled and confused.

One of my pookies that proof-read this was listening to Margaret by Lana Del Ray and the song fits so much with this prompt so please listen while chatting with him. I had so much fun writing this bot. I know this request is really old but I do hope that the requester still uses my bots. I'd like to make more requests in the future because there are quite a few that cook. I hope I did this request justice regardless!

Take care everyone,

Alpha Nickel signing off.

(ps. The smell beastzai bot was also one of my favorites hehe)
